title: Oreo's YT Videos Modpack
description: Modpack for Making Good Minecraft Videos
body:
# About The Mod

**-->Note: If you use this modpack in your videos, please include a link to it in the description (just a friendly request).**


**-->Note: None of the mods in this modpack are owned by me.**


**-->Note:(For The Users of 2.0.0) EasyNPC and Some optimisation mods were removed because they Didn't updated to version 1.20.4 ( on the Date: 28 February 2025, Time: 5:22 IST).**


**------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

Unleash Your Creativity with This Must-Have Modpack for Captivating Minecraft Videos
Enhance your Minecraft experience with this incredible modpack that transforms your gameplay into a visual masterpiece! Say goodbye to the ordinary and welcome the extraordinary, captivating your audience with stunning visuals and unique content.

This modpack not only improves the game but also boosts your ability of Your low-end device. With a variety of textures and shaders,  you can create breathtaking landscapes, intricate builds, and thrilling adventures.

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8da63779be0c4e802c3f94ebe593a1f8e5375c83_0.webp)
